synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23290 Oracle Linux 10 java-21-openjdk bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23290
description:
[1:21.0.9.0.10-2.0.1]
- Add Oracle vendor bug URL [Orabug: 34340155]

[1:21.0.9.0.10-2]
- Bump rpmrelease for CentOS build
- Add scripts to handle tagging of portable-based RPMs
- Related: RHEL-118771
- Related: RHEL-119468
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23290

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23290.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
